member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.Internal.ConsoleRenderer
member.summary: Renders QR code module matrix as Unicode block characters for console display. Uses half-block characters to achieve 2:1 aspect ratio correction.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.Internal.ConsoleRenderer.Render(System.Boolean[0:,0:],ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCodeOptions)
member.summary: Renders a QR code module matrix as a string using Unicode block characters. Processes 2 rows at a time to create 1 console line for aspect ratio correction.
member.param: The QR code module matrix where true = dark, false = light.
Rendering options including quiet zone and color inversion.
member.returns: A string containing the rendered QR code.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCode
member.summary: Main entry point for generating and displaying QR codes in the console.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCode.Generate(System.String,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCodeOptions)
member.summary: Generates a QR code as a string of Unicode block characters. The returned string can be printed to console or saved to a file.
member.param: The text to encode in the QR code. Cannot be null or empty.
Optional configuration for QR generation and rendering.
member.returns: A string containing the QR code rendered with Unicode block characters.
member.exception: Thrown when text is empty or exceeds QR code capacity.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCode.Print(System.String,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCodeOptions)
member.summary: Generates and prints a QR code directly to Console.Out.
member.param: The text to encode in the QR code. Cannot be null or empty.
Optional configuration for QR generation and rendering.
member.exception: Thrown when text is empty or exceeds QR code capacity.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCodeOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for QR code generation and rendering.

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCodeOptions.ErrorCorrection
member.summary: Gets or sets the error correction level for the QR code. Higher levels allow more data recovery if the code is damaged, but reduce capacity. Default is M (medium, ~15% recovery).

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCodeOptions.InvertColors
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to invert the colors (light background, dark foreground). Useful for light-themed terminals. Default is false.

member.name: P:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.QRCodeOptions.QuietZoneSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the quiet zone (border) around the QR code in modules. QR spec recommends at least 4, but 1 works for most scanners. Default is 1.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.ErrorCorrectionLevel
member.summary: Error correction level for QR code encoding. Higher levels provide more error recovery but reduce data capacity.

member.name: F:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.CLI.ErrorCorrectionLevel.M
member.summary: Medium - recovers approximately 15% of data (recommended default)
